name: Guru
description: Guru — AI-powered knowledge management platform that surfaces verified company knowledge in developer and support team workflows via browser extension.

seo.title: Guru — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: Guru: Guru — AI-powered knowledge management platform that surfaces verified company knowledge in developer and support team workflows via browser extension.

when_to_use: Verified internal API docs surfaced inline in Slack and Chrome
Onboarding knowledge cards triggered by new-hire browser activity
Support team answers auto-suggested from verified knowledge base
Engineering runbooks made searchable via Guru browser extension
Stale doc flagging workflow ensuring knowledge stays accurate

pros: Browser extension surfaces knowledge where work happens
Verification workflow keeps content from going stale
Strong AI search across captured knowledge cards
Good integrations with Slack, Chrome, and support tools
cons: Card-based structure feels awkward for long docs
Per-seat pricing adds up fast across teams
Less developer-focused than Notion or Confluence
review.verdict: Solid knowledge tool for support and ops teams; overkill and awkwardly structured for pure dev docs.
review.best_for: Support and sales teams needing quick, verified answers surfaced in their daily tools.
review.not_for: Engineering teams wanting rich, long-form developer documentation and API references.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Per-seat plan; no explicit annual non-reducible commit evidence.
